title: HTB Bizness — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Bizness writeup. Apache OFBiz CVE-2023-49070 pre-auth RCE, SHA1 hash cracking from Derby database and path to root.

title: Python ARP Spoofing Tool
description: Python ARP spoofing script using Scapy for MITM attacks on local networks. Includes IP forwarding toggle and ARP cache restoration on exit.

title: DNS Recon Notes
description: DNS recon quick reference: zone transfers, reverse lookup, subdomain brute-force with dnsrecon, dnsx and amass. DNS over HTTPS tips.

title: DLL Injection Techniques
description: Deep dive into DLL injection: classic LoadLibrary injection, reflective DLL loading, DLL proxying and AppInit_DLLs persistence mechanism.

title: HTB Sightless — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Sightless writeup. SQLPad SSTI RCE in a Docker container, shadow file cracking and Chrome remote debugging port for root.

title: Bash Log Parser for Apache & Nginx
description: Bash script to parse Apache and Nginx access logs: top IPs, 4xx/5xx errors, suspicious user-agents and brute-force detection by request rate.

title: Red Team OPSEC Notes
description: OPSEC quick reference for red teamers: infrastructure separation, redirectors, domain fronting, C2 profile tips and avoiding common EDR triggers.

title: Wi-Fi Attack Techniques
description: Research on modern Wi-Fi attacks: WPA2 4-way handshake capture, PMKID attack, evil twin with hostapd-wpe and captive portal credential harvest.

title: HTB Cicada — Easy Windows
description: HackTheBox Cicada writeup. SMB guest access, password in HR document, RID cycling for user enumeration and SeBackupPrivilege for NTDS dump.

title: Python LDAP Enumerator
description: Python script to enumerate Active Directory via LDAP: users, groups, SPNs, password policies and AS-REP roastable accounts.

title: Web Cache Poisoning Notes
description: Web cache poisoning quick reference: unkeyed headers, parameter cloaking, fat GET requests and cache deception attack patterns.

title: HTB Headless — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Headless writeup. Blind XSS via User-Agent to steal admin cookie, SSTI in a Flask dashboard and sudo script injection for root.
